description.value:
Border-march drill-texts on enduring pain — the Beinmark border troops are legendary for finishing battles they should have lost; this harness carries the cadence of their drill-texts inscribed in iron wire, refusing to let the wearer fall.

Effect: Once per respite, when your Stamina would be reduced to 0 or lower, you instead remain at 1 Stamina.

Rules: Stamina; Dying; Respite.

project.prerequisites: A suit of armor of exceptional quality; a strip of iron wire from a Beinmark drill-master's kit
